root.sql: SELECT DISTINCT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_name_show FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_dep_m_creditor WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '20' ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '011001' and '011001' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
